conversation.content: Let's have a physics class. Today we are going to learn about the form of the centripetal force formula in circular motion calculations in the world of Azeroth. It is different from conventional physics formulas in the real world and has a more fantasy flair.
My notebook is ready, let's begin.
In this world, the core formula specification for the centripetal force formula is: its form is F = m × v × r².
I have noted down this specification.
This formula can be used to solve for centripetal force F when mass m, linear velocity v, and radius r are known.
Okay, I understand the application scenario of this specification.
